description: A Windows-native observer for solstone — gathers screen and system audio (plus the microphone when present) into local, owner-controlled segments for your journal. No telemetry; nothing phones home.
notes: This is a portable install: solstone's built-in self-updater is inert here, so scoop owns updates — run 'scoop update solstone' for new versions.
Your journal data lives in %LOCALAPPDATA%\Solstone and is preserved across scoop updates.
